name: Classic Current Account
features: Contactless debit card,Online banking,Mobile app,Free UK transfers,Overdraft facility up to £500
description: Our everyday current account with no monthly fee. Includes a Visa debit card, free UK transfers, and access to an arranged overdraft.

name: Premier Current Account
features: Dedicated relationship manager,Travel insurance,Airport lounge access,Worldwide multi-trip insurance,0% foreign transaction fee,Overdraft up to £2000
description: Exclusive account for customers earning £75,000+ or holding £100,000+ in savings. Includes worldwide travel insurance, airport lounge access, and a dedicated relationship manager. Monthly fee of £25.

name: Student Current Account
features: 0% overdraft up to £1500,Railcard discount,No monthly fees,Student discounts,Mobile app
description: Free account for students in full-time UK higher education. Includes an interest-free overdraft up to £1,500 and a 1/3 off railcard for three years.

name: Cash ISA
features: 4.5% AER variable,Tax-free interest,Instant access,£20,000 annual allowance,FSCS protected up to £85,000
description: Save up to £20,000 per tax year with zero tax on interest earned. Earn 4.5% AER variable, with instant access to your money. Ideal for tax-efficient saving.

name: Stocks & Shares ISA
features: No platform fee first year,Choose from 3000+ funds,Tax-free growth,£20,000 annual allowance,Flexible withdrawals
description: Invest up to £20,000 per year free of UK income and capital gains tax. Access 3,000+ investment funds, shares, and ETFs. No platform fee in the first year.

name: Lifetime ISA
features: 25% government bonus,Save up to £4,000/year,Bonus of up to £1,000/year,Use for first home or retirement,3.5% AER
description: Save up to £4,000 per year and receive a 25% government bonus (up to £1,000/year). Use to buy your first home (up to £450,000) or for retirement from age 60. Must open before age 40.

name: Junior ISA
features: 4.0% AER,£9,000 annual allowance,Tax-free growth,Converts to adult ISA at 18,FSCS protected
description: Save up to £9,000 per tax year for a child under 18, completely free of tax. The pot converts to an adult ISA when the child turns 18. Ideal for parents or grandparents building a nest egg.

name: 1-Year Fixed Rate Bond
features: 5.0% AER fixed,Guaranteed return,Min £1,000 deposit,FSCS protected,Interest paid at maturity
description: Lock in a guaranteed 5.0% AER for 12 months. Ideal for money you won't need access to. Minimum deposit £1,000, maximum £500,000. Interest paid at maturity.

name: 2-Year Fixed Rate Bond
features: 5.2% AER fixed,Guaranteed return,Min £1,000 deposit,FSCS protected,Interest paid annually
description: Lock in a guaranteed 5.2% AER for 24 months. Higher rate rewards longer commitment. Interest paid annually. Minimum £1,000 deposit.

name: Easy Access Savings Account
features: 3.8% AER variable,Instant access,No minimum deposit,Unlimited withdrawals,FSCS protected
description: Earn 3.8% AER with complete flexibility. Withdraw anytime, deposit anytime. No minimum balance. Perfect for emergency funds and short-term goals.

name: Regular Saver Account
features: 7.0% AER fixed for 12 months,Save £25-£500/month,Existing customers only,Boosted rate rewards habit
description: Earn a market-leading 7.0% AER fixed for 12 months by saving between £25 and £500 every month. Available exclusively to current account holders. Ideal for building a disciplined saving habit.

name: Residential Mortgage
features: 4.8% fixed for 2 years,Up to 95% LTV,Overpayments up to 10%/year,Free valuation,No early repayment fee in year 1
description: Fixed rate mortgage at 4.8% for two years, then reverting to standard variable rate. Borrow up to 95% of the property value. Free valuation included.

name: Help to Save Account
features: 50% government bonus,Save up to £50/month,Bonus after 2 and 4 years,Available on Universal Credit or Working Tax Credit
description: Government-backed savings account for people on Universal Credit or Working Tax Credit. Save up to £50 per month and receive a 50% bonus after 2 and 4 years. Earn up to £1,200 in bonuses over four years.

name: Home Insurance Bundle
features: Buildings & contents combined,New for old replacement,Accidental damage cover,Emergency home assist,Legal expenses £50,000
description: Combined buildings and contents insurance from £28.50/month. Covers your home structure and possessions against fire, theft, and flood. Includes 24/7 emergency home assist and legal expenses up to £50,000.
